## 6. Broken-service / data-health flags

| # | Severity | Flag | Evidence |
|--:|---|---|---|
| 1 | 🔴 **HIGH** | **`decision_tracking` table is empty** | 0 rows lifetime despite 528 decision_points. The post-decision price-tracking loop is not writing — every accuracy/feedback metric downstream is blind. Highest-impact data outage in the system. |
| 2 | 🔴 **HIGH** | **`ai_score` only populated for 10 rows from 2026-04-09** | 518 / 528 NULL, including all 9 of today's rows. The scoring writer has been silent for ~6 weeks. Any dashboard or ranking that depends on `ai_score` is reading mostly null. |
| 3 | 🔴 **HIGH** | **`sector` field essentially unpopulated (7 / 528 non-null)** | Renders any sector-cluster analytics impossible without external lookups. Today this audit had to map sectors manually. |
| 4 | 🔴 **HIGH** | **WTW stop_loss_price (253.50) > current_price (247.72)** | Active position #28. Either trailing-stop math is wrong, the field is being interpreted in the wrong direction, or a stop-out failed to fire. Inspect `tracking_service.py` immediately — risk-management integrity issue. |
| 5 | 🟠 **MEDIUM** | **DR funnel gap: 41 lifetime BUY / BUY_LIMIT rows have no DR verdict (excluding today)** | Includes recent real names: ARGTF (2026-05-18, ~50h old), APPF & APP (2026-05-13, ~169h old), ELAN, VIV, FLUT, NTRA, GMAB, CRWV, CHYM, CDW, CLH. Some are TEST rows but most are real. DR queue is either dropping items, hitting persistent rate-limit timeouts, or the writer is silently failing. |
| 6 | 🟠 **MEDIUM** | **Active-position desk_reviews are 6 days stale** | All 5 ACTIVE rows show `last_reviewed_at = 2026-05-14`. No `desk_reviews` recorded today. Sell-Council / review loop hasn't run since 14 May. |
| 7 | 🟠 **MEDIUM** | **Status mismatch: 63 decision_points marked `status='Owned'` with NO desk_position row at all** | This is a real schema drift, not the "closed but still tagged Owned" case (which accounts for another 40). Indicates legacy ownership tagging that never migrated to the desk_positions model. |
| 8 | 🟠 **MEDIUM** | **Status mismatch: MHVIY desk_position is ACTIVE, but decision_point #449 still says `status='Not Owned'`** | Inverse of the above — ACTIVE position not reflected back to the dp row. |
| 9 | 🟡 **LOW** | **Sell-Council (`reassess_*`) columns are 100% empty** | Either Plan A reassessment script hasn't been wired into the scheduled loop, or it has not found candidates. |
| 10 | 🟡 **LOW** | **Subscribers table empty (0 rows)** | Email-summary loop has no audience. May be intentional during research preview. |
| 11 | 🟡 **LOW** | **RDDT & EQPT today have `data_depth='{}'`** | Two of the 9 candidates produced no sensor output. Could be a TradingView/news-fetch failure or a coverage gap. Worth a one-off retry to distinguish. |
| 12 | 🟡 **LOW** | **DR `ERROR_PARSING` = 3 lifetime (3.5% of DR rows)** | Low and contained, but the DR JSON parser deserves a defensive pass. |

---

## 7. Insights & takeaways

- **The book is profitably skewed but mean-reverting toward zero.** 55% win rate × +6% avg winners vs -3.6% avg losers gives a positive expectancy, but DESK_DECISION exits (45% of closes) are flat-to-slightly-negative — the discretionary override layer is leaving money on the table relative to letting TAKE_PROFIT triggers fire.
- **STOP_LOSS exits are the only category with no winners and average -6.6%.** Six STOP_LOSS + two TRAILING_STOP closes is small sample, but tightening stops or adding a "no add on -3% day-after entry" guard could meaningfully reduce realized drawdown.
- **Deep Research is doing real work where it runs.** Of 85 reviewed rows, **91.7% triggered a meaningful change** (ADJUSTED 54%, OVERRIDDEN 38%, UPGRADED/INCOMPLETE 4%). DR's downgrade-to-AVOID rate (35/85 = 41%) is the single biggest reason the system isn't loading up on every BUY.
- **But DR is bottlenecked.** 41 prior BUY/BUY_LIMIT rows never received a verdict, including names from a week+ ago. The 60s rate limit alone doesn't explain 169-hour-old gaps — there is queue loss or worker failure.
- **Tracking infrastructure is the highest-impact missing piece.** `decision_tracking` empty + `ai_score` empty + `desk_reviews` stale means there is no live feedback loop. The roadmap's backtesting harness is moot until basic post-decision price collection is fixed.
- **Today is light and clean.** 9 candidates, 1 BUY_LIMIT (ADI), no obvious surprises. Earnings season pulled in HAS, BILI, TGT, ADI, GDS — five of nine. Earnings drops are dominant today.
- **WTW is the urgent operational risk.** A stop above price on an ACTIVE position is either bad math or a missed exit. Either way the integrity check fails.
- **Sector & ai_score nulls are quiet but corrosive.** They've been broken long enough (since 2026-04-09 for ai_score) that downstream code may have silently adapted; new analytics can't trust either column.

## 8. Suggested next actions

| Priority | Action | Why |
|---|---|---|
| **P0** | Investigate WTW stop-loss state in `tracking_service.py` | Risk-management integrity; live position. |
| **P0** | Restart / debug the `decision_tracking` writer | Whole feedback loop is dark without it. |
| **P0** | Re-mount Desktop + Documents into the scheduled task | Both primary audit destinations failed today. |
| **P1** | Diagnose DR worker queue: scan logs since 2026-05-13 for dropped items / rate-limit failures | 41 missing BUY/BUY_LIMIT reviews. |
| **P1** | Re-enable the `ai_score` writer | Silent since 2026-04-09. |
| **P1** | Run a one-off retry on RDDT + EQPT to confirm fetch-failure vs coverage gap | Cheap, high signal. |
| **P2** | Reconcile `decision_points.status` ↔ `desk_positions.status` (one-time SQL migration) | 63 Owned-with-no-position + 40 stale-Owned + 1 inverse (MHVIY). |
| **P2** | Trigger today's DR pass on ADI before close tomorrow; verify it lands in DB | Closes today's DR funnel gap. |
| **P2** | Wake up the desk-review loop (last review 6 days ago) | ACTIVE positions are running unreviewed. |
| **P3** | Backfill `sector` column from yfinance/Polygon for the existing 521 rows | Unblocks sector analytics. |
| **P3** | Consider a guard rule: skip new entries when a position closed STOP_LOSS within prior 3 days for that name | The CE / NICE / SHOP / ALC cluster suggests buying into still-falling knives. |
